name: attest-dev
postCreateCommand: poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true && poetry install --no-interaction --no-ansi
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'if [ -f poetry.lock ]; then current=$(sha256sum poetry.lock | cut -d" " -f1); saved=$(cat .devcontainer/.poetry.lock.sha256 2>/dev/null || true); if [ ! -d .venv ] || [ "$current" != "$saved" ]; then poetry install --no-interaction --no-ansi && echo "$current" > .devcontainer/.poetry.lock.sha256; fi; fi'
